reviews.title: The best sound speaker
reviews.text: The sound you can trust for big bang partys bang bang
reviews.author: VenkataM

reviews.title: Powerful speaker
reviews.text: Crisp and clear sound. Worth every penny and easy to carry. Highly recommended if you look for quality sound.
reviews.author: Sher

reviews.title: Bang & Olufsen
reviews.text: This is an amazing speaker, great for travel and also charges
reviews.author: Ajay

reviews.title: B&O left no crumbs
reviews.text: Everything you could want and more in a portable speaker. The B&O Beloit has been around for over a decade with different variations coming into the marketplace. While the price is a bit high this legacy speaker brand will not disappoint. The highs are extremely crisp full of detail and the 5.5 inch woffer packs a full punch whilst never sounding muddy. The battery does die a bit fast when volume is high but this is to be expected from a 240 watt speaker. Can’t wait to see how B&O update the next iteration of Beloit.
reviews.author: DavidM

reviews.title: The Best Bluetooth Speaker
reviews.text:
This is the best bluetooth speaker I've ever had. The sound is crisp and clear. The bass is very deep. I love the sleek design and the easy to carry on strap.
You get what you pay for and you will not be disappointed.
reviews.author: EnriquenD

reviews.title: B&O Beolit20 Speaker - love it!
reviews.text: Excellent sound - great bass and balance. We love this product for its ease of set up and customization. Cool to have your phone charge while resting on top great feature. Nice touch to add multiple country plugs for ease of travel. The product is nice and light and easy to carry for anybody in the household. Thinking of buying another for more flexibility and connected sound.
reviews.author: OliverW

reviews.title: BEST PORTABLE SPEAKER
reviews.text: This is easily the greatest sounding Bluetooth speaker I have ever used. The bass is so present and clear. The volume goes insanely high. The quality is beyond whatever the competition is. My only gripe the battery does not last long.
reviews.author: Teddy

reviews.title: Big Clean Sound
reviews.text: This Beolit 20 is a big improvement over another brand that we replaced.  The sound is crisp, clear and fuller sound (especially the lower end) than we were used to, especially for its size.  It maintains the high quality big sound even outdoors by the pool.
reviews.author: GeekBook

reviews.title: Not a great battery.
reviews.text: Great speaker,  amazing sound, but doesn't the battery doesn't last 8 hrs.
reviews.author: Great

reviews.title: Awesome sound!!
reviews.text: For the size the sound is incredible and the fact it has a wireless charger built on top makes it convenient and it came with other countries adapters
reviews.author: Jinae86

reviews.title: does not sound good
reviews.text: not worth the money. Sounds muddy to me, like all the sounds clumped together and hard to distinguish. I ended up returning this item.
reviews.author: Ronafusa777

reviews.title: Amazing speaker with rich sound
reviews.text: Awesome portable speaker with amazing sound. Love when have the volume low, but it puts out amazing sound with crisp treble and bass. However, the battery isn't that great, wish it would last much longer.
reviews.author: Thach

reviews.title: Best speaker purchased so far
reviews.text: Excellent sound quality and looks nice as decor too.
reviews.author: Anamika

reviews.title: Great!
reviews.text: This is a great product! The sound field is open and the bass is powerful. Recommended! Worth it!
reviews.author: JunM

reviews.title: Excellent product
reviews.text: Love , love, love it, high quality sound quality and very easy to use.
reviews.author: user410544

reviews.title: Terrible battery
reviews.text: I really wanted to like this item, but unfortunately the lack of power after reaching the halfway mark of the battery is very poor. Charge doesn’t stay for more than 2/3 hours. And you can’t even plug in to enjoy the full power.
reviews.author: Tamjid

reviews.title: Amazing speaker
reviews.text: Clear sound! Really enjoy this speaker. Easy to carry everywhere.
reviews.author: HyojeongK

reviews.title: Bang and Olefsun portable speaker
reviews.text: I love this speaker! I got it to replace my Bose speaker that had battery issues after years of use. I wanted a speaker of high quality. After doing research, I found that Bang and Olefsun had high ratings. I always buy from Best Buy and they had it on sale, bonus! It sounds amazing. A bit on the bassy side but I'm sure I could adjust that on my phone equalizer.
reviews.author: Michelle

reviews.title: Rock and a hard place
reviews.text: This speaker is amazing, the price is worth it. Wish it could better battery life and loudness but over great speaker.
reviews.author: Argentine

reviews.title: Best sounding portable speaker!
reviews.text: I’ve compared this speaker to the Sonos move and Bose portable speaker. This speaker has a lot more body and quality bass. It does not give 360 degree sound like the other two, however I was looking for a top of the line audio quality that I can take anywhere.  At $550 is a bit steep but well worth it.  I got it on sale and it was a no brainer.
reviews.author: Migs

reviews.title: Great Speaker
reviews.text: Very good quality sound. Great looking. Easy to use.
reviews.author: Smvt

reviews.title: Worth it.
reviews.text: Smaller and lighter than I thought, not saying that is bad at all because it still sounds amazing.  I do not use the wireless charger on top and the battery lasts a good amount of time.  Connecting to my phone was really easy using the app.
reviews.author: Averagejoe

reviews.title: Sound quality is amazing
reviews.text: Best bluetooth speaker I ever owned. If you have the money get it
reviews.author: Dinoflo

reviews.title: As expected, great sound!
reviews.text: What sound from a moderate size speaker! Bass is not lacking even in larger rooms. Battery lasts at lower volume level. At +80% and higher volume levels will last several hours enough for a party (2-3 hours). It's the sound quality and build quality that is evident.
reviews.author: LeoR

reviews.title: Hands Down The Best Very Impressed!
reviews.text:
Had a 15 and 17 now a 20. All I can say is Bang & Olufsen hammered the the 20. Perfect latest software is just incredible amazing. Have had many I mean many Bluetooth speakers 40 to be exactly 37. a lot of thought has gone into it. Missed nothing! If you like all Types of music this is your Bluetooth. Perfect mids highs and bass. Very clear! No disappointment at all listen low or high perfect and very detailed!
Little pricey its worth double its very well built. Perfect sound!
And you can lay your phone on top and charge it. Very happy man! Thank you Best Buy delivery was perfect!
reviews.author: Tj128

reviews.title: Love it, love it!!!
reviews.text: Just WOW. Coming from a JBL Boombox I thought it was powerful. Beolit is powerful and sounds awesome, plus it’s beautiful and has QI charging, pricey but worth it….

reviews.title: Its own class
reviews.text: This speaker creates an entirely new presence. Even at lower volumes the bass is warm, punchy and filling and the acoustics and vocals just get better and better as you crank the volume. Last speaker I had was a Harman Karon Oynx and I loved it, but there’s absolutely no comparison.
reviews.author: MattHorn
